name: RoboManip-1M
description: A large-scale robotic manipulation dataset containing over 1 million trajectories across 50+ tasks, collected from both real robots and high-fidelity simulation.

name: BimanualNav Dataset
description: Bimanual robot navigation and object interaction dataset with language annotations, designed for embodied AI research and language-conditioned policies.

name: SimToReal Transfer Benchmark
description: Benchmark dataset for sim-to-real transfer research, featuring paired simulation and real-world data with domain randomization annotations.

name: DexHand Grasp Collection
description: High-resolution dexterous hand grasping dataset with tactile sensor readings, force data, and multi-view RGB-D streams for fine-grained manipulation.

name: LocoMotion-500K
description: Legged robot locomotion dataset covering diverse terrains and gaits. Includes IMU, joint state, and vision data for learning robust locomotion policies.

name: Humanoid Whole-Body Dataset
description: Whole-body motion dataset for humanoid robots, featuring teleoperated demonstrations with retargeting from human motion capture data.
